title: xyris conocephala var. pallescens
intro: Xyris conocephala var. pallescens, also known as the yellow-eyed grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Xyridaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Xyris conocephala var. pallescens include the treatment of skin conditions, wound healing, and the reduction of fever. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the roots or leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
